subcodes.first_line: The peoples and nations cling to vain imaginings and hold fast to idle fancies, for they have been nurtured under the shadow of the deluded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم و امم باوهام متمسکند و بظنون متشبث چه که در ظل متوهمین تربیت یافته اند
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for women
